heading: Flood risk in Spencer — What Property Owners Need to Know

faq.question: Does flood risk risk affect property insurance in Spencer?
faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Spencer can be influenced by flood risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
